name: shell-geogrid-liner
full_name: Shell, Geogrid, and Liner Structural Properties
description: Shell-type elements share thickness/material properties. Geogrids and liners add grid-interaction coupling springs. Shell and geogrid are FLAC3D-only; liner has separate FLAC2D and FLAC3D formulations.

notes: Orthotropic and anisotropic shell models use additional material stiffness and orientation properties.
Embedded FLAC3D liners also support side-2 variants such as coupling-stiffness-normal-2 and coupling-yield-normal-2.
FLAC2D liners use line-based coupling units; FLAC3D liners use area-based coupling units.

common_patterns.name: Elastic shell
commands: structure shell property young 2e10 poisson 0.2 thickness 0.25 density 2400

common_patterns.name: Liner with shear and normal coupling
commands: structure liner property young 2e10 poisson 0.2 thickness 0.25 coupling-stiffness-normal 1e9 coupling-stiffness-shear 1e9 coupling-cohesion-shear 1e5 coupling-friction-shear 30
